governanceDecisionRecord._note: This sub-object conforms to owner-ops/governance/decision-record.schema.json (additionalProperties:false). The surrounding MIGRATION_4 structure is a superset the committed schema cannot represent; see schemaCompatibility.
governanceDecisionRecord.scope: Market Intelligence x GEO reconciliation — Kazakhstan six-exchange MIGRATION_3B discrepancy owner decision (documentation only; no production/ranking/route/publication change)
governanceDecisionRecord.problem: MIGRATION_3B surfaced production-vs-MI discrepancies for Kazakhstan (bybit LEGACY_MORE_PERMISSIVE/HOLD_REVIEW; mexc/okx INCOMPARABLE/HOLD_CONFLICTING; bitget MATCH/NO_ACTION_SHADOW; kucoin/bingx MATCH/NEEDS_EVIDENCE). An explicit owner disposition is required before any ranking integration, while production must remain frozen and authoritative.
options: Freeze production, record per-exchange owner decisions, define required evidence, and keep MIGRATION_5 blocked (SELECTED)
Migrate production availability into canonical MI cells now (REJECTED — evidence incomplete, conflicts unresolved)
Flip bybit production to a verified MI state now (REJECTED — no official Kazakhstan-specific evidence reviewed)
governanceDecisionRecord.complianceImpact: No production, ranking, CTA, promo, route or publication change. Unresolved AFSA regulator conflicts (mexc/okx) retained as CONFLICTING; bitget restriction retained; affiliate value irrelevant to ranking; NO-PROXY mode; English only.
governanceDecisionRecord.decision: OWNER_APPROVED_DECISION_RECORD: production GEO remains authoritative and unchanged; per-exchange decisions recorded (bybit HOLD_REVIEW P0; mexc/okx HOLD_CONFLICTING P0; bitget RESTRICTED candidate pending freshness P1; kucoin/bingx UNKNOWN NEEDS_EVIDENCE P1); MIGRATION_5 and the noindex Bybit x Kazakhstan Deep Passport pilot remain BLOCKED; no production/ranking/route/publication/MI-cell/compiled-matrix/translation work is authorized.
rejectedAlternatives: Migrate availability into canonical MI cells now
Promote bybit to a verified available MI state now

schemaCompatibility.reason: The committed decision-record schema sets additionalProperties:false and defines a fixed council-decision shape. The MIGRATION_4 record requires migration-specific fields (countryCode, migrationPhase, exchangeDecisions, migration5Gate, authorization booleans, etc.) that the committed schema cannot represent. Per task instruction the schema was NOT modified.
schemaCompatibility.validationPerformed: Honest structural validation: JSON parses; governanceDecisionRecord contains all 8 required fields with correct types (decisionId,date,scope,problem,rolesConsulted,decision,ownerApproval,nextReviewDate) and only schema-declared properties; ISO dates well-formed.

nextTask: CBW-MI-GEO-KZ-EVIDENCE-RESEARCH-QUEUE-001 — owner-gated capture/review of the P0 (bybit, mexc, okx) then P1 (bitget freshness, kucoin, bingx) official Kazakhstan evidence packages defined here (NO-PROXY, official-source, dated), feeding a later MIGRATION_5 GO. No MI cell, ranking, CTA, route, page, translation, or Deep Research is authorized by this record.
